title: Using Cloud Trace on Kubernetes Engine
description: This is a self-paced lab that takes place in the Google Cloud console. This lab deployings a Kubernetes Engine cluster, then a simple web application fronted by a load balancer is deployed to the cluster. The web app publishes messages provided by the user to a Cloud Pub/Sub topic. You will see the correlated telemetry data from HTTP requests to the app will be available in the Cloud Trace Console.
